positions.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
positions.description: Led the development of scalable web-based learning platforms and internal tools for the academy. Built responsive user interfaces with React and maintained secure backends using PHP and MySQL. Mentored junior developers and implemented modern coding standards across all projects.

positions.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
positions.description: Architected and developed advanced web and mobile applications, focusing on seamless integration between frontend and backend systems. Designed scalable APIs, optimized database performance, and ensured efficient deployment pipelines for production environments.

positions.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
positions.description: Spearheading the development of enterprise-level web applications with a focus on performance, security, and scalability. Managing the full development cycle — from UI design in Next.js to backend integration with Node.js and MongoDB. Collaborating with designers and product teams to deliver top-tier digital solutions.
